mapper.update:
update article
title = #{title},
content = #{content},
cover_image = #{coverImage},
category_id = #{categoryId},
like_count = #{likeCount},
favorite_count = #{favoriteCount},
view_count = #{viewCount},
slug = #{slug},
is_top = #{isTop},
status = #{status},
recommend_level = #{recommendLevel},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_time = #{updateTime},
images = #{images},
where id = #{id}
update article set like_count = coalesce(like_count,0) + 1 where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from article where id in
#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET recommend_level = #{level} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id,title,status,create_time,cover_image from article order by update_time desc limit #{i}
select count(id) from article where category_id in #{id}

select * from article
title like concat('%',#{title},'%') and category_id = #{categoryId} and status = #{status} and id in (select article_id from article_tags where tags_id = #{tagId}) and id in (select article_id from user_article where user_id = #{userId} and is_favorite = 1)
order by create_time desc
select id, title, cover_image, like_count, favorite_count, view_count, create_time, category_id, recommend_level from article where status = 0 AND (recommend_level != 0 OR recommend_level IS NULL)
select id, slug, update_time from article where status = 0 order by update_time desc
